zh.lifeSummary: 當Scolastica Lady de Cotham於1250年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德時，她的父親Ralph De Cotam20歲，母親Mrs Christian de Cotam21歲。她於1279年之後與John Conyers Lord Sockburn在英國達勒姆索可本結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1298年在英國英格蘭越可爾享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Scolastica Lady de Cotham于1250年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德时，她的父亲Ralph De Cotam20岁，母亲Mrs Christian de Cotam21岁。她于1279年之后与John Conyers Lord Sockburn在英国達勒姆索可本结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1298年在英国英格兰越可爾享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Grzegorz, Irena, Lucyna, Witold.

Polish (mainly Łada) and Czech (Moravian): from a short form of the Polish personal name Ładysław, Czech Ladislav, both from Vladislav (Latinized as Ladislaus), a Slavic name composed of the elements vlad ‘to rule’ (from Old Slavic vlasti, later vladati) + slav ‘glory’ or ‘famous’ (from slava ‘glory’). Compare 2 below.
Hungarian: from Lad(a), a short form of the personal name Ladomér, a Hungarian form of Slavic Vladimir (see Lado 2, compare 1 above).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cotham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of   Cotton  .

variants.name: Cotton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places called from Old English (æt) cotum (dative plural of cot) ‘at the cottages or huts’ (or sometimes possibly from a Middle English plural, coten). Examples include Coton (Cambridgeshire, Northamptonshire, Staffordshire), Cottam (East Yorkshire, Lancashire, Nottinghamshire), and Cotham (Nottinghamshire). Particularly common in Staffordshire.
French: from a pet form of the personal name Nicolas (see Nicholas ), derived via Nicot, or of the personal name Jacques , derived via Jacot.
History: John Cotton (1584–1652) was a noted Puritan preacher, who landed at Boston, MA, from London in 1633 and became leader of the Congregationalists in America.

en.lifeSummary: When Scolastica Lady de Cotham was born in 1250, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph De Cotam, was 20 and her mother, Mrs Christian de Cotam, was 21. She married John Conyers Lord Sockburn after 1279, in Sockburn, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1298, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Scolastica Lady de Cotham est née en 1250, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph De Cotam, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mrs Christian de Cotam, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé John Conyers Lord Sockburn après 1279, à Sockburn, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1298, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Scolastica Lady de Cotham 1250 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph De Cotam 20 und ihre Mutter Mrs Christian de Cotam 21. Sie hat nach 1279 in Sockburn, Durham, England John Conyers Lord Sockburn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1298 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Scolastica Lady de Cotham è nata il nel 1250 nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ralph De Cotam, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Mrs Christian de Cotam, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato John Conyers Lord Sockburn dopo il 1279, nel Sockburn, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1298, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Scolastica Lady de Cothamが1250年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父Ralph De Cotamは20歳，母Mrs Christian de Cotamは21歳であった。1279年以後にイギリスダルハムソクブルンでJohn Conyers Lord Sockburnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1298年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Scolastica Lady de Cotham(이)가 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph De Cotam(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs Christian de Cotam(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1279년 이후 영국 뒤람 속번에서 John Conyers Lord Sockburn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1298년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com John Conyers Lord Sockburn após 1279, em Sockburn, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Scolastica Lady de Cotham родилась в 1250 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph De Cotam было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs Christian de Cotam, 21.
